summary: Excellent soundboard recording captures a scorching Capitol Theatre performance highlighted by an unforgettable Help → Slipknot! → Franklin’s Tower.
review: This pre‑fade mix delivers crystal‑clear audio with perfectly balanced drums and bass, letting the band’s high‑energy show shine through. Reviewers rave about the sweltering atmosphere of the June 19 1976 concert and especially praise the soaring Help > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower sequence. The recording is noted as a huge upgrade over previous cassette or audience captures.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are highly positive, praising both the superb soundboard quality and the exceptional performance, especially the Help/Slip/Franklin's sequence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp pre‑fade mix with well‑balanced levels; Mickey’s drums and Bill’s bass are spot‑on. No noticeable dropouts, though one reviewer mentioned a faint background noise on the stream.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans recall a high‑energy set in sweltering Capitol Theatre heat, with tight transitions and an especially soaring second‑set sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as having a 'superfreak' look, adding excitement to the performance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey’s drum levels are spot on; Bill’s bass is also noted as perfectly balanced.
